name: Eureka 93 Inc.
summary: Eureka 93 Inc., a cannabidiol (CBD) life sciences company, engages in the research, development, extraction, production, processing, and distribution of CBD and other cannabinoids in the United States and Canada. The company offers hemp-derived CBD products, full plant extracts, and isolate powder. It is also involved in the development and manufacture of natural health products, as well as nutraceutical contract manufacturing business. The company is headquartered in Gatineau, Canada.
